stemHtml:
An aircraft is climbing from an airport at Mean Sea Level to an altitude of 21 000 ft.
Determine the wind vector which should be used to plan the climb, given:

The reported surface wind is 030°/15 kt and it is in ISA conditions.
The upper winds are:
FL 050: 050°/25 kt
FL 100: 070°/30 kt
FL 180: 090°/40 kt
FL 240: 110°/50 kt
